definitions: 沮丧的；垂头丧气的；情绪低落的

examples.text: Being good was far more boring than he had imagined— so he swiftly abandoned his companion. Unable to continue alone, Tripitaka sat dejected, until a strange woman approached him. She gave him a sumptuous silk shirt and a cap hiding a band of gold
examples.explanation: 这里 dejected 描述 Tripitaka 独自无法继续前行时的状态，意思是“沮丧的、垂头丧气的”。

source.text: The tale of the Monkey King and the Buddha - Ji Hao
